ground_truth.title: Extermination Specials | Pest Control Deals
ground_truth.main_content: Eliminate 'Em Pest Control Services offers extermination specials for Connecticut property owners. Take $40 off any pest control or rodent elimination service with this special coupon. The $40 off seasonal service coupon is for proactive tick and mosquito treatment. For $100 off, customers can receive termite elimination, rodent sealing, or bat exclusion services with full premises cleaning and sanitizing of basements, attics, and garages. All services include guaranteed pest elimination and removal of all pests and wildlife. Licensed technicians are available 24/7 for immediate service. The company accepts VISA, MC, AMEX, DISCOVER, Cash and Personal Checks. Coupons are valid for new services only and expire December 25th, 2025.
